notes:
**Fixes & polish**

- **The window can no longer scroll sideways.** The note column now always fits exactly between the sidebars, with its margins intact at every window size — a single box-model bug used to let content slip under the left sidebar and spawn a horizontal scrollbar. (PRD Addendum 21 §U.)
- **The tab bar sits on one clean line.** Every control in the tab bar now shares a single visual baseline — the active tab's label no longer sags a pixel below its neighbours, and the back/forward arrows match the size of the other icons. (PRD Addendum 22 §6.8, the control-line rule, locked 2026-07-16.)

**Under the hood**

- **The Glass Theme Lab** — a dev-builds-only tuning panel for the Glass theme's translucency constants (P1–P7). It is applied-only and compiled out of release binaries entirely, so it never ships to users. (Theming Update 2; PRD Addendum 24 / ADR-0016.)
- A parked design proposal for the B+D double-Enter escape behaviour is now recorded in `docs/proposals/`.
